title: Questlist — Lifetime Bucket List
html:
Lifetime quest list — checklist of bucket-list ambitions. Mix of travel (seven wonders: machu picchu, petra, chichen itza already done; great wall of china, taj mahal, rome colosseum, christ the redeemer pending), wealth (1m in a month, $1B company, IPO), family (house for mom yahir by a river, college for aytana and ainoa), and life events (marry his "lynchpin," meet a US President, ship an app, NBA stake).

TL;DR

  • seven wonders tracking: 3 of 7 done — machu picchu, petra, chichen itza crossed off as of 2024-03-02.
  • Family goals are explicit and load-bearing: house for mom yahir, college funded for sisters aytana and ainoa.
  • Founder ambitions stacked: $1M month, billion-dollar company, take a company public, ship app on App Store.
  • Life-meaning slots: marry a "holistically beautiful lynchpin," go to japanese blossom gardens, have kids, be a great dad.
  • Random/fun: get tattoo by saggy-tittied grandma, get in a street fight, be part of an anime creative process.

questlist · seven wonders · mom yahir · aytana · ainoa · life goals · japanese blossom gardens
